formulas.mean: novelty = 1 − cos(e, corpus-mean). Distance from the single centre. (≡ low global density)
formulas.knn5: novelty = mean cos-distance to the 5 nearest corpus hooks. Local emptiness (tight).
formulas.knn15: novelty = mean cos-distance to the 15 nearest corpus hooks. Local emptiness.
formulas.knn50: novelty = mean cos-distance to the 50 nearest corpus hooks. Local emptiness (broad).
formulas.niche8: novelty = 1 − max cos to 8 k-means centroids. Distance to the nearest of 8 themes.
formulas.niche25: novelty = 1 − max cos to 25 k-means centroids. Distance to the nearest of 25 themes.
formulas.niche80: novelty = 1 − max cos to 80 k-means centroids. Distance to the nearest of 80 themes.
formulas.maha: novelty = ‖PCA-whitened(e)‖. Mahalanobis distance — how unusual given the covariance.
formulas.mode: novelty = 1 − cos(e, densest corpus exemplar). Distance from the single most-typical hook.
